```text
1	{% extends "base.html" %}
2	{% set page = "index" %}
3	{% block title %}台股產業寶 · 產業地圖{% endblock %}
4	
5	{% block content %}
6	<section class="landing-hero">
7	  <div class="landing-hero-inner">
8	    <p class="eyebrow">Taiwan Industry Intelligence · {{ last_date }}</p>
9	    <h1 class="landing-title">追蹤台股題材族群的<br>每日脈動與資金流向</h1>
10	    <p class="landing-lede">
11	      彙整 57 個產業題材、2,000 餘檔個股，涵蓋 AI 伺服器到第三代半導體、從光通訊 CPO 到傳統產業。
12	      資料每日更新，幫助投資人快速定位當前市場熱度、輪動方向與法人佈局。
13	    </p>
14	    <div class="landing-meta">
15	      <div><strong>{{ total_groups }}</strong><em>題材族群</em></div>
16	      <div><strong class="positive">{{ total_limit_up }}</strong><em>今日漲停</em></div>
17	      <div><strong class="negative">{{ total_limit_down }}</strong><em>今日跌停</em></div>
18	      <div><strong>{{ top_flow[0][0] if top_flow else '—' }}</strong><em>資金最熱</em></div>
19	    </div>
20	  </div>
21	</section>
22	
23	<section class="section-block">
24	  <header class="section-head">
25	    <h2 class="section-title">產業地圖</h2>

27	  </header>
28	
29	  <div class="category-map">
```

```text
35	  line-height: 1.65;
36	  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
37	  font-feature-settings: 'palt';
38	}
39	h1, h2, h3, h4 {
40	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', 'Source Serif 4', 'Source Serif Pro',
41	               'PingFang TC', 'Microsoft JhengHei', serif;
42	  letter-spacing: 0;
43	}
44	a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
45	a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
46	
47	/* ─────── HEADER ─────── */
48	.site-header {
49	  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
50	  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
51	  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
52	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
53	}
54	.header-inner {
55	  max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
56	  padding: 12px 24px;
57	  display: grid;
58	  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
59	  align-items: center;
60	  gap: 32px;
61	}
62	.logo {
63	  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
64	  color: var(--text);
65	}
66	.logo-mark {
67	  width: 36px; height: 36px;
68	  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
69	  background: var(--accent-dark);
70	  border-radius: 2px;
71	  font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px;
72	  color: #fff;
73	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
74	}
75	.logo-text strong {
76	  display: block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;
77	  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
78	}
79	.logo-text em {
80	  display: block; font-size: 10px;
81	  color: var(--text-mute); font-style: normal;
82	  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
83	}
84	
85	.primary-nav {
86	  display: flex; gap: 4px;
87	  justify-self: start;
88	}
89	.primary-nav a {
90	  padding: 8px 14px;
91	  border-radius: 8px;
92	  color: var(--text-soft);
93	  font-weight: 500;
94	  transition: all 0.15s;
95	  font-size: 14px;
96	}
97	.primary-nav a:hover {
98	  background: var(--bg-elev);
99	  color: var(--text);
100	}
101	.primary-nav a.active {
102	  color: var(--accent);
103	  background: var(--accent-soft);
104	}
105	
106	.search-box {
107	  position: relative;
108	  min-width: 340px;
109	}
110	.search-box input {
111	  width: 100%;
112	  padding: 9px 12px 9px 38px;
113	  background: var(--bg-elev);
114	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
115	  border-radius: 10px;
116	  color: var(--text);
117	  font-size: 13px;
118	  outline: none;
119	  transition: all 0.15s;
120	}
121	.search-box input:focus {
122	  border-color: var(--accent);
123	  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft);
124	}
125	.search-icon {
126	  position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 50%;
127	  transform: translateY(-50%);
128	  color: var(--text-mute);
129	  font-size: 14px;
130	}
131	.search-dropdown {
132	  position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 6px); left: 0; right: 0;
133	  max-height: 480px; overflow-y: auto;
134	  background: var(--bg-elev);
135	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
136	  border-radius: 10px;
137	  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
138	}
139	.search-section-title {
140	  padding: 6px 14px;
141	  font-size: 11px;
142	  color: var(--text-mute);
143	  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
144	  text-transform: uppercase;
145	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
146	}
147	.search-section-title:first-child { border-top: none; }
148	.search-item {
149	  display: block;
150	  padding: 10px 14px;
151	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
152	  cursor: pointer;
153	  transition: background 0.1s;
154	}
155	.search-item:first-child, .search-item.first { border-top: none; }
156	.search-item:hover, .search-item.active {
157	  background: var(--bg-elev-2);
158	}
159	.search-item strong { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text); }
160	.search-item small { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-mute); margin-top: 2px; }
161	
162	/* ─────── MAIN ─────── */
163	.site-main {
164	  max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
165	  padding: 24px;
166	}
167	
168	/* ─────── LANDING HERO（產業地圖導覽頁）─────── */
169	.landing-hero {
170	  padding: 56px 0 48px;
171	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
172	  margin-bottom: 48px;
173	}
174	.landing-hero-inner { max-width: 860px; }
175	.eyebrow {
176	  margin: 0 0 16px;
177	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
178	  font-size: 11px;
179	  font-weight: 600;
180	  letter-spacing: 2px;
181	  color: var(--accent-dark);
182	  text-transform: uppercase;
183	}
184	.landing-title {
185	  margin: 0 0 20px;
186	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
187	  font-size: 44px;
188	  font-weight: 700;
189	  line-height: 1.35;
190	  color: var(--text);
191	  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
192	}
193	.landing-lede {
194	  margin: 0 0 36px;
195	  max-width: 680px;
196	  font-size: 16px;
197	  line-height: 1.85;
198	  color: var(--text-soft);
199	}
200	.landing-meta {
201	  display: grid;
202	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, max-content);
203	  gap: 48px;
204	  padding-top: 28px;
205	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
206	}
207	.landing-meta > div { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
208	.landing-meta strong {
209	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
210	  font-size: 28px;
211	  font-weight: 700;
212	  color: var(--text);
213	  line-height: 1;
214	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
215	}
216	.landing-meta em {
217	  font-style: normal;
218	  font-size: 12px;
219	  color: var(--text-mute);
220	  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
221	}
222	
223	/* ─────── SECTION BLOCK ─────── */
224	.section-block { margin-bottom: 64px; }
225	.section-head {
226	  margin-bottom: 24px;
227	  padding-bottom: 14px;
228	  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--text);
229	  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 24px;
230	  flex-wrap: wrap;
231	}
232	.section-title {
233	  margin: 0;
234	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
235	  font-size: 22px;
236	  font-weight: 700;
237	  color: var(--text);
238	  letter-spacing: 0;
239	}
240	.section-sub {
241	  margin: 0;
242	  font-size: 13px;
243	  color: var(--text-mute);
244	}
245	
246	/* ─────── CATEGORY MAP GRID ─────── */
247	.category-map {
248	  display: grid;
249	  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
250	  gap: 1px;
251	  background: var(--border-soft);
252	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
253	}
254	.category-card {
255	  display: flex;
256	  background: var(--bg);
257	  padding: 0;
258	  transition: background 0.15s;
259	  position: relative;
260	}
261	.category-card:hover { background: var(--bg-elev); }
262	.category-rule {
263	  width: 4px;
264	  flex-shrink: 0;
265	  align-self: stretch;
266	}
267	.category-card-body {
268	  padding: 18px 20px;
269	  flex: 1;
270	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
271	}
272	.category-card-head { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
273	.category-name {
274	  margin: 0;
275	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
276	  font-size: 18px;
277	  font-weight: 700;
278	  color: var(--text);
279	  line-height: 1.3;
280	}
281	.category-count {
282	  font-size: 11px;
283	  color: var(--text-mute);
284	  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
285	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
286	}
287	.category-topics {
288	  list-style: none;
289	  padding: 0; margin: 0;
290	  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px 10px;
291	  font-size: 12px;
292	  color: var(--text-soft);
293	  min-height: 36px;
294	}
295	.category-topics li::before {
296	  content: '·';
297	  margin-right: 4px;
298	  color: var(--text-mute);
299	}
300	.category-topics li:first-child::before { content: ''; margin: 0; }
301	.category-stats {
302	  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;
303	  margin-top: auto;
304	  padding-top: 12px;
305	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
306	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
307	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
308	}
309	.category-stats > span:first-child { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; }
310	.category-stats .amt { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-mute); }
311	
312	@media (max-width: 720px) {
313	  .landing-title { font-size: 30px; }
314	  .landing-lede { font-size: 15px; }
315	  .landing-meta { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
316	}
317	
318	/* ─────── HERO（舊）保留給其他頁用 ─────── */
319	.hero {
320	  padding: 40px 0 32px;
321	  margin-bottom: 32px;
322	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
323	}
324	.hero h1 {
325	  margin: 0 0 10px;
326	  font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700;
327	  color: var(--text);
328	  letter-spacing: 0;
329	  line-height: 1.3;
330	}
331	.hero h1 small {
332	  font-weight: 400; font-size: 15px;
333	  color: var(--text-mute);
334	  margin-left: 16px;
335	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
336	}
337	.hero p {
338	  margin: 0; color: var(--text-soft);
339	  font-size: 15px;
340	  max-width: 820px;
341	  line-height: 1.75;
342	}
343	
344	.topic-hero {
345	  padding: 40px 0 32px;
346	  margin-bottom: 32px;
347	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
348	  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
349	  padding-left: 20px;
350	}
351	.topic-hero-inner { max-width: 960px; }
352	.category-tag {
353	  display: inline-block;
354	  padding: 4px 12px;
355	  border-radius: 20px;
356	  font-size: 12px;
357	  font-weight: 600;
358	  margin-bottom: 12px;
359	}
360	.topic-hero h1 {
361	  margin: 0 0 6px;
362	  font-size: 34px;
363	  color: var(--text);
364	  font-weight: 700;
365	  letter-spacing: 0;
366	  line-height: 1.25;
367	}
368	.topic-hero h1 small { color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif; }
369	.topic-en {
370	  margin: 0 0 16px;
371	  color: var(--text-mute);
372	  font-size: 13px;
373	  letter-spacing: 1px;
374	  text-transform: uppercase;
375	}
376	.topic-desc {
377	  margin: 0 0 20px;
378	  color: var(--text-soft);
379	  font-size: 15px;
380	  line-height: 1.7;
381	}
382	.topic-kpis {
383	  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px;
384	  padding-top: 16px;
385	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
386	}
387	.topic-kpis .kpi {
388	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px;
389	}
390	.topic-kpis em {
391	  font-style: normal; color: var(--text-mute);
392	  font-size: 12px;
393	}
394	.topic-kpis strong {
395	  font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;
396	}
397	
398	/* ─────── BREADCRUMB ─────── */
399	.breadcrumb {
400	  padding: 8px 0 16px;
401	  font-size: 13px;
402	  color: var(--text-mute);
403	}
404	.breadcrumb a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
405	
406	/* ─────── STAT GRID ─────── */
407	.stat-grid {
408	  display: grid;
409	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
410	  gap: 16px;
411	  margin-bottom: 24px;
412	}
413	.stat-card {
414	  background: var(--bg-elev);
415	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
416	  border-radius: var(--radius);
417	  padding: 18px 20px;
418	}
419	.stat-label {
420	  font-size: 12px;
421	  color: var(--text-mute);
422	  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
423	  margin-bottom: 8px;
424	}
425	.stat-value {
426	  font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800;
427	  color: var(--text);
428	  line-height: 1.1;
429	}
430	.stat-value small {
431	  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-mute);
432	  margin-left: 6px;
433	}
434	.stat-sub {
435	  font-size: 12px;
436	  color: var(--text-mute);
437	  margin-top: 6px;
438	}
439	
440	/* ─────── INDICATOR GRID (題材頁 4 個指標卡) ─────── */
441	.indicator-grid {
442	  display: grid;
443	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
444	  gap: 16px;
445	  margin-bottom: 24px;
446	}
447	.indicator-card {
448	  background: var(--bg-elev);
449	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
450	  border-radius: var(--radius);
451	  padding: 16px 20px;
452	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
453	}
454	.indicator-card small {
455	  color: var(--text-mute);
456	  font-size: 11px;
457	  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
458	  text-transform: uppercase;
459	}
460	.indicator-card strong {
461	  font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;
462	  color: var(--text);
463	}
464	
465	/* ─────── GRID 2 COL ─────── */
466	.grid-2col {
467	  display: grid;
468	  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
469	  gap: 16px;
470	  margin-bottom: 24px;
471	}
472	@media (max-width: 960px) {
473	  .grid-2col, .stat-grid, .indicator-grid {
474	    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
475	  }
476	  .header-inner { grid-template-columns: auto auto; row-gap: 12px; }
477	  .primary-nav { grid-column: 1 / -1; justify-self: stretch; overflow-x: auto; }
478	  .search-box { grid-column: 1 / -1; min-width: 0; }
479	}
480	
481	/* ─────── PANEL ─────── */
482	.panel {
483	  background: var(--bg);
484	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
485	  border-radius: var(--radius);
486	  overflow: visible;  /* 讓 tooltip 能脫出 panel */
487	  margin-bottom: 20px;
488	  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
489	  position: relative;
490	}
491	.panel-header {
492	  padding: 16px 22px;
493	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
494	  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
495	}
496	.panel-header h2 {
497	  margin: 0;
498	  font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700;
499	  color: var(--text);
500	  letter-spacing: 0;
501	}
502	.muted { color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 12px; }
503	
504	/* ─────── TABLE ─────── */
505	.table {
506	  width: 100%;
507	  border-collapse: collapse;
508	  font-size: 13px;
509	}
510	.table th {
511	  padding: 11px 14px;
512	  text-align: left;
513	  color: var(--text-mute);
514	  font-weight: 600;
515	  font-size: 12px;
516	  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
517	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
518	  background: var(--bg-elev);
519	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
520	}
521	.table td {
522	  padding: 11px 14px;
523	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
524	}
525	.table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
526	.table tr:hover td { background: var(--bg-elev); }
527	.table.compact td, .table.compact th { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 12.5px; }
528	
529	.positive { color: #dc2626 !important; font-weight: 600; }  /* 台股：紅漲 */
530	.negative { color: #059669 !important; font-weight: 600; }  /* 台股：綠跌 */
531	
532	/* ─────── CHIPS / BADGES ─────── */
533	.topic-chip {
534	  display: inline-block;
535	  padding: 3px 10px;
536	  border: 1px solid;
537	  border-radius: 2px;
538	  font-size: 12.5px;
539	  font-weight: 600;
540	  transition: all 0.15s;
541	}
542	.topic-chip:hover { background: currentColor; color: #fff !important; }
543	
544	.tag {
545	  display: inline-block;
546	  padding: 2px 8px;
547	  margin: 2px 2px 2px 0;
548	  background: var(--bg-elev);
549	  border-radius: 2px;
550	  font-size: 11px;
551	  color: var(--text-soft);
552	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
553	}
554	.tag-more {
555	  position: relative;
556	  cursor: help;
557	  background: var(--bg);
558	  color: var(--accent-dark);
559	  border-color: var(--accent-dark);
560	  font-weight: 600;
561	}
562	.tag-more:hover {
563	  background: var(--accent-dark);
564	  color: #fff;
565	}
566	/* ───── 自繪 tooltip（data-tip 屬性） ───── */
567	.tag-more[data-tip]:hover::before,
568	.tag-more[data-tip]:hover::after {
569	  opacity: 1;
570	  pointer-events: none;
571	}
572	.tag-more[data-tip]::after {
573	  content: attr(data-tip);
574	  position: absolute;
575	  bottom: calc(100% + 8px);
576	  left: 50%;
577	  transform: translateX(-50%);
578	  padding: 7px 11px;
579	  background: #111827;
580	  color: #fff;
581	  font-size: 12px;
582	  font-weight: 500;
583	  line-height: 1.5;
584	  white-space: nowrap;
585	  max-width: 320px;
586	  border-radius: 4px;
587	  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
588	  opacity: 0;
589	  transition: opacity 0.12s;
590	  z-index: 1000;
591	  text-align: center;
592	}
593	.tag-more[data-tip]::before {
594	  content: '';
595	  position: absolute;
596	  bottom: calc(100% + 3px);
597	  left: 50%;
598	  transform: translateX(-50%);
599	  border: 5px solid transparent;
600	  border-top-color: #111827;
601	  opacity: 0;
602	  transition: opacity 0.12s;
603	  z-index: 1000;
604	}
605	.tag-industry {
606	  background: var(--bg);
607	  color: var(--text-mute);
608	  font-style: normal;
609	  border-style: dashed;
610	}
611	
612	.badge {
613	  display: inline-block;
614	  padding: 2px 7px;
615	  border-radius: 2px;
616	  font-size: 11px;
617	  font-weight: 700;
618	}
619	.badge-red { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; border: 1px solid #fca5a5; }
620	.badge-green { background: #d1fae5; color: #047857; border: 1px solid #6ee7b7; }
621	
622	.pill {
623	  display: inline-block;
624	  padding: 2px 10px;
625	  border-radius: 20px;
626	  font-size: 11px;
627	  font-weight: 600;
628	  white-space: nowrap;
629	}
630	
631	/* ─────── BAR LIST ─────── */
632	.bar-list { padding: 8px 0; }
633	.bar-row {
634	  display: grid;
635	  grid-template-columns: 140px 1fr 80px;
636	  gap: 12px; align-items: center;
637	  padding: 9px 22px;
638	  transition: background 0.1s;
639	}
640	.bar-row:hover { background: var(--bg-elev); }
641	.bar-label { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }
642	.bar-track {
643	  height: 6px;
644	  background: var(--bg-elev-2);
645	  border-radius: 2px;
646	  overflow: hidden;
647	  position: relative;
648	}
649	.bar-fill { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.3s; }
650	.bar-value { text-align: right; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-soft); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
651	
652	/* ─────── SNAPSHOT ─────── */
653	.snapshot {
654	  display: grid;
655	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
656	  gap: 0;
657	  padding: 4px 0;
658	}
659	.snapshot > div {
660	  padding: 16px 20px;
661	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
662	  border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
663	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
664	}
665	.snapshot > div:nth-child(4n) { border-right: none; }
666	.snapshot > div:nth-last-child(-n+4) { border-bottom: none; }
667	.snapshot em { font-style: normal; color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 12px; }
668	.snapshot strong { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; }
669	@media (max-width: 760px) {
670	  .snapshot { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
671	  .snapshot > div:nth-child(2n) { border-right: none; }
672	  .snapshot > div:nth-child(4n) { border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }
673	}
674	
675	/* ─────── RELATED CHIPS ─────── */
```

 `C:\Users\user\Desktop\fin ai\族群統計網頁\site\static\app.js`

```text
1	// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
2	//   台股產業寶 - 搜尋 autocomplete + 互動
3	// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
4	
5	(function() {
6	  const input = document.getElementById('global-search');
7	  const dropdown = document.getElementById('search-dropdown');
8	  if (!input || !dropdown) return;
9	
10	  let SEARCH_DATA = [];
11	  let activeIdx = -1;
12	  let currentResults = [];
13	
14	  // 從 window.SEARCH_DATA（由 search-data.js 注入）讀入，避 file:// fetch CORS
15	  function waitForData(cb, tries) {
16	    tries = tries || 0;
17	    if (window.SEARCH_DATA && Array.isArray(window.SEARCH_DATA)) {
18	      SEARCH_DATA = window.SEARCH_DATA;
19	      SEARCH_DATA.forEach(it => { it._k = (it.keywords || it.label).toLowerCase(); });
20	      cb();
21	    } else if (tries < 50) {
22	      setTimeout(() => waitForData(cb, tries + 1), 80);
23	    } else {
24	      console.warn('SEARCH_DATA 載入逾時');
25	    }
26	  }
27	  waitForData(bindEvents);
28	
29	  function bindEvents() {
30	    function filter(q) {
31	      if (!q) return [];
32	      q = q.toLowerCase().trim();
33	      const tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
34	      return SEARCH_DATA.filter(it =>
35	        tokens.every(t => it._k.includes(t))
36	      ).slice(0, 20);
37	    }
38	
39	    function render(results) {
40	      currentResults = results;
41	      activeIdx = -1;
42	      if (!results.length) {
43	        dropdown.innerHTML = '<div class="search-item muted first">找不到相符結果</div>';
44	        dropdown.hidden = false;
45	        return;
46	      }
47	      const topics = results.filter(r => r.type === 'topic');
48	      const companies = results.filter(r => r.type === 'company');
49	      const parts = [];
50	      if (topics.length) {
51	        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">題材 / 族群</div>');
52	        topics.forEach((t) => {
53	          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${t.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(t)}">
54	            <strong>${t.label}</strong><small>${t.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
55	        });
56	      }
57	      if (companies.length) {
58	        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">公司 / 個股</div>');
59	        companies.forEach((c) => {
60	          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${c.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(c)}">
61	            <strong>${c.label}</strong><small>${c.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
62	        });
63	      }
64	      dropdown.innerHTML = parts.join('');
65	      dropdown.hidden = false;
66	
67	      dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(el => {
68	        el.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
69	          e.preventDefault();
70	          if (el.dataset.href) window.location.href = el.dataset.href;
71	        });
72	        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
73	          dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
74	          el.classList.add('active');
75	          activeIdx = parseInt(el.dataset.idx || -1, 10);
76	        });
77	      });
78	    }
79	
80	    let debounce;
81	    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
82	      clearTimeout(debounce);
83	      debounce = setTimeout(() => {
84	        const r = filter(input.value);
85	        render(r);
86	      }, 80);
87	    });
88	
89	    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
90	      if (input.value) render(filter(input.value));
91	    });
92	
93	    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
94	      if (!e.target.closest('.search-box')) dropdown.hidden = true;
95	    });
96	
97	    input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
98	      if (!currentResults.length) return;
99	      const items = Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item[data-href]'));
100	      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
101	        e.preventDefault();
102	        activeIdx = Math.min(activeIdx + 1, items.length - 1);
103	        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
104	        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
105	      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
106	        e.preventDefault();
107	        activeIdx = Math.max(activeIdx - 1, 0);
108	        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
109	        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
110	      } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
111	        e.preventDefault();
112	        if (items[activeIdx]) window.location.href = items[activeIdx].dataset.href;
113	        else if (items[0]) window.location.href = items[0].dataset.href;
114	      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
115	        dropdown.hidden = true;
116	        input.blur();
117	      }
118	    });
119	
120	    // 快捷鍵 '/' 聚焦搜尋
121	    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
122	      if (e.key === '/' && e.target.tagName !== 'INPUT' && e.target.tagName !== 'TEXTAREA') {
123	        e.preventDefault();
124	        input.focus();
125	      }
126	    });
127	  }
128	})();
129
```

```text
7	  python site/build_site.py --open                # 建完自動開首頁

16	    data/search.json        # 搜尋資料
17	    data/heatmap_<tf>.json  # 熱力圖資料（daily/weekly/monthly）
18	    static/                 # CSS/JS

63	def _load_finlab_data():
64	    """從 FinLab 載入必要資料"""
65	    from finlab import data
66	    print("  [FinLab] 下載 price/成交股數/成交金額...")
67	    d = {}
68	    d["close"]  = data.get("price:收盤價")
69	    d["open"]   = data.get("price:開盤價")
70	    d["high"]   = data.get("price:最高價")
71	    d["low"]    = data.get("price:最低價")
72	    d["volume"] = data.get("price:成交股數")
73	    d["amount"] = data.get("price:成交金額")
74	    print("  [FinLab] 下載法人資料...")
75	    try:
76	        d["foreign"] = data.get(
77	            "institutional_investors_trading_summary:外陸資買賣超股數(不含外資自營商)"
78	        )
79	    except Exception:
80	        d["foreign"] = None
81	    try:
82	        d["trust"] = data.get(
83	            "institutional_investors_trading_summary:投信買賣超股數"
84	        )
85	    except Exception:
86	        d["trust"] = None
87	    print("  [FinLab] 下載公司基本資料...")
88	    info = data.get("company_basic_info")
89	    d["name_map"]     = info.set_index("symbol")["公司簡稱"].to_dict()
90	    d["industry_map"] = info.set_index("symbol")["產業類別"].to_dict() if "產業類別" in info.columns else {}
91	    d["market_map"]   = info.set_index("symbol")["市場別"].to_dict() if "市場別" in info.columns else {}
92	    return d

95	def load_data(use_cache=False) -> dict:
96	    """載入資料（支援快取）"""
97	    if use_cache and CACHE_META.exists() and CACHE_FILE.exists():
98	        print(f"[快取] 從 {CACHE_FILE.name} 讀取")
99	        meta = json.loads(CACHE_META.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
100	        combo = pd.read_parquet(CACHE_FILE)
101	        d = {}
102	        for key in ["close", "open", "high", "low", "volume", "amount", "foreign", "trust"]:
103	            cols = [c for c in combo.columns if c.startswith(f"{key}|")]
104	            if not cols:
105	                d[key] = None
106	                continue
107	            sub = combo[cols].copy()
108	            sub.columns = [c.split("|", 1)[1] for c in cols]
109	            d[key] = sub
110	        d["name_map"]     = meta.get("name_map", {})
111	        d["industry_map"] = meta.get("industry_map", {})
112	        d["market_map"]   = meta.get("market_map", {})
113	        return d
114	
115	    d = _load_finlab_data()
116	
117	    # 寫快取
118	    try:
119	        frames = []
120	        for key in ["close", "open", "high", "low", "volume", "amount", "foreign", "trust"]:
121	            df = d.get(key)
122	            if df is None or df.empty:
123	                continue
124	            df2 = df.copy()
125	            df2.columns = [f"{key}|{c}" for c in df2.columns]
126	            frames.append(df2)
127	        combo = pd.concat(frames, axis=1)
128	        combo.to_parquet(CACHE_FILE)
129	        CACHE_META.write_text(
130	            json.dumps(
131	                {
132	                    "name_map": d["name_map"],
133	                    "industry_map": d["industry_map"],
134	                    "market_map": d["market_map"],
135	                    "ts": datetime.now().isoformat(),
136	                },
137	                ensure_ascii=False,
138	            ),
139	            encoding="utf-8",
140	        )
141	        print(f"[快取] 已寫入 {CACHE_FILE.name}")
142	    except Exception as e:
143	        print(f"[警告] 快取寫入失敗：{e}")
144	
145	    return d
146

152	def compute_stock_metrics(d: dict) -> pd.DataFrame:
153	    """個股多時間維度指標。回傳 index=symbol, columns=[ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d, amount, ...]"""
154	    close = d["close"]
155	    amount = d["amount"]
156	    foreign = d["foreign"]
157	    trust = d["trust"]
158	
159	    last = close.iloc[-1]
160	    prev = close.iloc[-2]
161	    ret_1d = (last - prev) / prev
162	
163	    # 5日、20日報酬
164	    ret_5d  = (last - close.iloc[-6])  / close.iloc[-6]  if len(close) >= 6  else pd.Series(dtype=float)
165	    ret_20d = (last - close.iloc[-21]) / close.iloc[-21] if len(close) >= 21 else pd.Series(dtype=float)
166	
167	    # 漲停旗標（收盤 >= 前日 * 1.095 粗估，簡化版）
168	    limit_up = (ret_1d >= 0.095).fillna(False)
169	    limit_down = (ret_1d <= -0.095).fillna(False)
170	
171	    # 今日成交金額（百萬元）
172	    amt_last = amount.iloc[-1] / 1_000_000 if amount is not None else pd.Series(dtype=float)
173	
174	    df = pd.DataFrame({
175	        "close":      last,
176	        "ret_1d":     ret_1d,
177	        "ret_5d":     ret_5d,
178	        "ret_20d":    ret_20d,
179	        "limit_up":   limit_up,
180	        "limit_down": limit_down,
181	        "amount_mn":  amt_last,
182	    })
183	
184	    # 法人
185	    if foreign is not None and not foreign.empty:
186	        foreign_last = foreign.iloc[-1] / 1000  # 張
187	        foreign_5d_sum = foreign.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
188	        df["foreign_1d"] = foreign_last
189	        df["foreign_5d"] = foreign_5d_sum
190	    else:
191	        df["foreign_1d"] = 0.0
192	        df["foreign_5d"] = 0.0
193	
194	    if trust is not None and not trust.empty:
195	        trust_last = trust.iloc[-1] / 1000
196	        trust_5d_sum = trust.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
197	        df["trust_1d"] = trust_last
198	        df["trust_5d"] = trust_5d_sum
199	    else:
200	        df["trust_1d"] = 0.0
201	        df["trust_5d"] = 0.0
202	
203	    return df
204	
205	
206	def compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
207	    """每個族群的彙總指標。回傳 dict: group_name -> summary"""
208	    result = {}
209	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
210	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)]
211	        if rows.empty:
212	            continue
213	        result[group] = {
214	            "members":        list(rows.index),
215	            "n_stocks":       len(rows),
216	            "ret_1d_mean":    float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
217	            "ret_1d_median":  float(rows["ret_1d"].median(skipna=True) or 0),
218	            "ret_5d_mean":    float(rows["ret_5d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
219	            "ret_20d_mean":   float(rows["ret_20d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
220	            "amount_sum_mn":  float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0),
221	            "n_limit_up":     int(rows["limit_up"].sum()),
222	            "n_limit_down":   int(rows["limit_down"].sum()),
223	            "n_foreign_buy":  int((rows["foreign_1d"] > 0).sum()),
224	            "n_trust_buy":    int((rows["trust_1d"] > 0).sum()),
225	            "top_stock":      rows["ret_1d"].idxmax() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
226	            "worst_stock":    rows["ret_1d"].idxmin() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
227	        }
228	    return result

231	def compute_related_topics(top_n=5) -> dict:
232	    """以共同成分股推導相關題材。每檔股票是一個 bag，兩族群的 Jaccard 相似度"""
233	    groups = {g: set(m) for g, m in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items()}
234	    related = {}
235	    for g1, s1 in groups.items():
236	        scores = []
237	        for g2, s2 in groups.items():
238	            if g1 == g2:
239	                continue
240	            inter = len(s1 & s2)
241	            if inter == 0:
242	                continue
243	            union = len(s1 | s2)
244	            jac = inter / union
245	            scores.append((g2, jac, inter))
246	        scores.sort(key=lambda x: (-x[1], -x[2]))
247	        related[g1] = [
248	            {"name": g2, "jaccard": round(j, 3), "shared": n}
249	            for g2, j, n in scores[:top_n]
250	        ]
251	    return related
252	
253	
254	def compute_company_topics() -> dict:
255	    """每檔股票反查所屬題材"""
256	    result = defaultdict(list)
257	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
258	        for s in members:
259	            result[s].append(group)
260	    return dict(result)

263	def compute_category_aggregates(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, group_metrics: dict) -> list:
264	    """彙總每個 category 層級資料：成分股（去重）、總成交額、平均漲跌、代表題材 Top 3、顏色"""
265	    cat_groups = defaultdict(list)
266	    for group in CONCEPT_GROUPS:
267	        cat = get_meta(group)["category"]
268	        cat_groups[cat].append(group)
269	
270	    result = []
271	    for cat, groups in cat_groups.items():
272	        # 該 category 下 unique 成分股
273	        unique_syms = set()
274	        for g in groups:
275	            unique_syms.update(CONCEPT_GROUPS[g])
276	        unique_syms &= set(stock_metrics.index)
277	        if not unique_syms:
278	            continue
279	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[list(unique_syms)]
280	        total_amt = float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0)
281	        # 加權平均（以成交額加權）
282	        if total_amt > 0:
283	            cat_ret = float((rows["ret_1d"] * rows["amount_mn"]).sum(skipna=True) / total_amt)
284	        else:
285	            cat_ret = float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0)
286	        # 代表題材：該 category 下按成交額排序取 Top 3
287	        top_groups = sorted(
288	            [(g, group_metrics.get(g, {}).get("amount_sum_mn", 0)) for g in groups],
289	            key=lambda x: -x[1],
290	        )[:3]
291	        top_names = [g for g, _ in top_groups]
292	        # color 用 CATEGORY_COLORS
293	        result.append({
294	            "name":        cat,
295	            "n_groups":    len(groups),
296	            "n_stocks":    len(unique_syms),
297	            "total_amt":   total_amt,
298	            "ret_mean":    cat_ret,
299	            "top_groups":  top_names,
300	            "color":       CATEGORY_COLORS.get(cat, "#64748b"),
301	        })
302	    result.sort(key=lambda x: -x["total_amt"])
303	    return result
304	
305	
306	def compute_topic_return_series(d: dict, members: list, days=125) -> dict | None:
307	    """計算族群當成等權重組合的 6 個月累積報酬曲線 + 近 1D/1W/1M 報酬。
308	    days=125 ≈ 6 個月交易日。回傳 dates, returns(%), ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d 全是百分比。"""
309	    close = d["close"]
310	    cols = [c for c in members if c in close.columns]
311	    if not cols:
312	        return None
313	    sub = close[cols].iloc[-(days + 1):]  # 多取一天算首日報酬
314	    if len(sub) < 5:
315	        return None
316	    # 每日各股報酬，跨股等權取平均（skipna 處理個股缺值）
317	    stock_rets = sub.pct_change()
318	    port_rets = stock_rets.mean(axis=1, skipna=True).fillna(0)
319	    # 第一列是首日，accum 起點 0
320	    port_rets.iloc[0] = 0
321	    cum = (1 + port_rets).cumprod() - 1
322	
323	    # 近 1D/5D/20D 投組報酬（組合日報酬乘積）
324	    def trailing(n):
325	        if len(port_rets) < n + 1:
326	            return None
327	        return float((1 + port_rets.iloc[-n:]).prod() - 1)
328	
329	    return {
330	        "dates":   [t.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") for t in cum.index],
331	        "values":  [round(float(v) * 100, 2) for v in cum.values],
332	        "ret_1d":  round(float(port_rets.iloc[-1] * 100), 2) if len(port_rets) else None,
333	        "ret_1w":  round(trailing(5)  * 100, 2) if trailing(5)  is not None else None,
334	        "ret_1m":  round(trailing(20) * 100, 2) if trailing(20) is not None else None,
335	    }
336	
337	
338	def compute_company_chart(d: dict, sym: str, days=60) -> dict | None:
339	    """計算個股 K 棒資料：最近 N 日 OHLCV + MA20 + MA60。沒資料回 None"""
340	    close = d["close"]
341	    if sym not in close.columns:
342	        return None
343	    try:
344	        # 取需要的視窗 + 多抓 60 日算 MA60
345	        c = close[sym].dropna()
346	        if len(c) < 5:
347	            return None
348	        lookback = min(len(c), days + 60)
349	        end_idx = len(c)
350	        start_idx = max(0, end_idx - lookback)
351	        idx = c.index[start_idx:end_idx]
352	        o = d["open"][sym].reindex(idx)
353	        h = d["high"][sym].reindex(idx)
354	        l = d["low"][sym].reindex(idx)
355	        cc = d["close"][sym].reindex(idx)
356	        v = d["volume"][sym].reindex(idx)
357	        ma20 = cc.rolling(20).mean()
358	        ma60 = cc.rolling(60).mean()
359	
360	        # 只回顯示區間（後 days 天）
361	        show_from = max(0, len(idx) - days)
362	        dates = [t.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") for t in idx[show_from:]]
363	        ohlc = [
364	            [
365	                round(float(o.iloc[i]), 2) if pd.notna(o.iloc[i]) else None,
366	                round(float(cc.iloc[i]), 2) if pd.notna(cc.iloc[i]) else None,
367	                round(float(l.iloc[i]), 2) if pd.notna(l.iloc[i]) else None,
368	                round(float(h.iloc[i]), 2) if pd.notna(h.iloc[i]) else None,
369	            ]
370	            for i in range(show_from, len(idx))
371	        ]
372	        volumes = [
373	            round(float(v.iloc[i]) / 1000, 0) if pd.notna(v.iloc[i]) else 0
374	            for i in range(show_from, len(idx))
375	        ]
376	        ma20_arr = [
377	            round(float(ma20.iloc[i]), 2) if pd.notna(ma20.iloc[i]) else None
378	            for i in range(show_from, len(idx))
379	        ]
380	        ma60_arr = [
381	            round(float(ma60.iloc[i]), 2) if pd.notna(ma60.iloc[i]) else None
382	            for i in range(show_from, len(idx))
383	        ]
384	        return {
385	            "dates":   dates,
386	            "ohlc":    ohlc,      # ECharts candlestick 順序：[open, close, low, high]
387	            "volume":  volumes,   # 千股
388	            "ma20":    ma20_arr,
389	            "ma60":    ma60_arr,
390	        }
391	    except Exception:
392	        return None
393

398	
399	_HEATMAP_COLORS_11 = (
400	    "#0b4a26", "#1a6e3a", "#2e8b4d", "#4fa66a", "#7dbf92",
401	    "#6e7681",
402	    "#c89e9e", "#d77272", "#d1344f", "#b91c34", "#8b0b22",
403	)
404	_BREAKS_DAILY       = (-9, -7, -5, -3, -1,  1,  3,  5,  7,  9)   # ±10 scale / 2% per step
405	_BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH  = (-27, -21, -15, -9, -3, 3, 9, 15, 21, 27)  # ±30 scale / 6% per step
406	
407	
408	def ret_to_color(ret_pct: float | None, tf: str = "daily") -> str:
409	    """ret_pct 已 × 100。daily 用 ±10% 色階（2%/檔）、週月用 ±30% 色階（6%/檔）"""
410	    if ret_pct is None or (isinstance(ret_pct, float) and pd.isna(ret_pct)):
411	        return "#6e7681"
412	    breaks = _BREAKS_DAILY if tf == "daily" else _BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH
413	    idx = 0
414	    for b in breaks:
415	        if ret_pct < b:
416	            break
417	        idx += 1
418	    return _HEATMAP_COLORS_11[idx]
419	
420	
421	def build_heatmap_data(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, name_map: dict, top_n_per_group=15) -> dict:
422	    """產生 ECharts treemap 格式。分三層：category > group > stock。
423	    每個節點的顏色 Python 端就算好塞進 itemStyle.color，繞開 ECharts 多層 color mapping 的坑。"""
424	    data_by_tf = {}
425	    for tf, col in [("daily", "ret_1d"), ("weekly", "ret_5d"), ("monthly", "ret_20d")]:
426	        cat_nodes = defaultdict(list)
427	        for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
428	            meta = get_meta(group)
429	            category = meta["category"]
430	            rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)].copy()
431	            if rows.empty:
432	                continue
433	            rows_sorted = rows.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(top_n_per_group)
434	            stock_leaves = []
435	            for sym in rows_sorted.index:
436	                ret = rows_sorted.at[sym, col]
437	                if pd.isna(ret):
438	                    continue
439	                amt = float(rows_sorted.at[sym, "amount_mn"] or 0)
440	                ret_pct = float(ret) * 100
441	                stock_leaves.append({
442	                    "name":      f"{name_map.get(sym, sym)} ({sym})",
443	                    "value":     [max(amt, 1), ret_pct],
444	                    "symbol":    sym,
445	                    "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(ret_pct, tf)},
446	                })
447	            if not stock_leaves:
448	                continue
449	            avg_ret_pct = float(rows[col].mean(skipna=True) or 0) * 100
450	            total_amt_group = sum(s["value"][0] for s in stock_leaves)
451	            cat_nodes[category].append({
452	                "name":      group,
453	                "value":     [total_amt_group, avg_ret_pct],
454	                "children":  stock_leaves,
455	                "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(avg_ret_pct, tf)},
456	            })
457	        # Category 層去重：同一個股在 category 下多個 group 都有時只算一次成交額
458	        result = []
459	        cat_stats = {}
460	        for cat, groups in cat_nodes.items():
461	            unique_stocks = {}  # sym -> (amt_mn, ret_pct)
462	            for g_node in groups:
463	                for leaf in g_node["children"]:
464	                    sym = leaf["symbol"]
465	                    if sym not in unique_stocks:
466	                        unique_stocks[sym] = (leaf["value"][0], leaf["value"][1])
467	            unique_amt = sum(v[0] for v in unique_stocks.values())
468	            # 以成交額加權平均報酬
469	            cat_ret = (
470	                sum(v[1] * v[0] for v in unique_stocks.values()) / unique_amt
471	                if unique_amt > 0 else 0
472	            )
473	            cat_stats[cat] = (unique_amt, cat_ret)
474	
475	        # 依 unique 成交額大→小排序 category
476	        for cat in sorted(cat_stats, key=lambda c: -cat_stats[c][0]):
477	            groups = cat_nodes[cat]
478	            if not groups:
479	                continue
480	            groups = sorted(groups, key=lambda g: -g["value"][0])
481	            unique_amt, cat_ret = cat_stats[cat]
482	            result.append({
483	                "name":      cat,
484	                "value":     [unique_amt, cat_ret],
485	                "children":  groups,
486	                "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(cat_ret, tf)},
487	            })
488	        data_by_tf[tf] = result
489	    return data_by_tf
490	
491	
492	def build_search_data(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, name_map: dict, company_topics: dict) -> list:
493	    """搜尋用資料。[{type, label, sub, href}]"""
494	    items = []
495	    for group in CONCEPT_GROUPS:
496	        meta = get_meta(group)
497	        items.append({
498	            "type":  "topic",
499	            "label": group,
500	            "sub":   meta["desc"][:50] + ("..." if len(meta["desc"]) > 50 else ""),
501	            "href":  f"topic/{slugify(group)}.html",
502	            "keywords": f"{group} {meta['en']} {meta['category']}",
503	        })
504	    for sym, name in name_map.items():
505	        if sym not in stock_metrics.index:
506	            continue
507	        topics = company_topics.get(sym, [])
508	        items.append({
509	            "type":  "company",
510	            "label": f"{name} ({sym})",
511	            "sub":   " / ".join(topics[:3]) if topics else "",
512	            "href":  f"company/{sym}.html",
513	            "keywords": f"{name} {sym} {' '.join(topics)}",
514	        })
515	    return items
516	
517	
518	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
519	#   模板渲染
520	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
521	
522	def slugify(name: str) -> str:
523	    """把中文題材名轉成可用的檔名 slug（用 hash 避免系統路徑問題）"""
524	    safe = name.replace("/", "_").replace("\\", "_").replace(" ", "")
525	    # 保留中文但限制長度
526	    if len(safe) > 30:
527	        safe = hashlib.md5(name.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:12]
528	    return safe
529	
530	
531	def pct(v) -> str:
532	    if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)):
533	        return "—"
534	    return f"{v*100:+.2f}%"
535	
536	
537	def fmt_amount(v) -> str:
538	    """v 單位 = 百萬元。顯示兩檔「億 / 萬」，不用千萬、不用 M（1 億 = 100 百萬）"""
539	    if v is None or pd.isna(v) or v <= 0:
540	        return "—"
541	    if v >= 100:                        # >= 1 億 → X.X 億
542	        return f"{v/100:.1f} 億"
543	    return f"{int(round(v*100))} 萬"    # < 1 億 → XXXX 萬
544	
545	
546	def build_env():
547	    env = Environment(
548	        loader=FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR)),
549	        autoescape=select_autoescape(["html"]),
550	    )
551	    env.filters["pct"] = pct
552	    env.filters["fmt_amount"] = fmt_amount
553	    env.filters["slugify"] = slugify
554	    env.globals["CATEGORY_COLORS"] = CATEGORY_COLORS
555	    env.globals["get_meta"] = get_meta
556	    env.globals["STOCK_HIGHLIGHTS"] = STOCK_HIGHLIGHTS
557	    return env
558	
559	
560	def render_all(data, stock_metrics, group_metrics, related, company_topics):
561	    env = build_env()
562	    name_map = data["name_map"]
563	    last_date = data["close"].index[-1].strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
564	
565	    # 共用資料
566	    base_ctx = {
567	        "now": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"),
568	        "last_date": last_date,
569	        "nav_topics": sorted(
570	            CONCEPT_GROUPS.keys(),
571	            key=lambda g: -group_metrics.get(g, {}).get("amount_sum_mn", 0)
572	        )[:8],
573	    }
574	
575	    # Index（每日焦點）
576	    total_groups = len(CONCEPT_GROUPS)
577	    total_limit_up = int(stock_metrics["limit_up"].sum())
578	    total_limit_down = int(stock_metrics["limit_down"].sum())
579	    top_gain = sorted(
580	        [(g, m) for g, m in group_metrics.items()],
581	        key=lambda x: -x[1]["ret_1d_mean"],
582	    )[:10]
583	    top_loss = sorted(
584	        [(g, m) for g, m in group_metrics.items()],
585	        key=lambda x: x[1]["ret_1d_mean"],
586	    )[:10]
587	    top_flow = sorted(
588	        [(g, m) for g, m in group_metrics.items()],
589	        key=lambda x: -x[1]["amount_sum_mn"],
590	    )[:10]
591	    top_limit = sorted(
592	        [(g, m) for g, m in group_metrics.items()],
593	        key=lambda x: -x[1]["n_limit_up"],
594	    )[:10]
595	
596	    # 個股漲幅榜（用 display_name 避開 pandas Series 的 .name 屬性衝突）
597	    # name_map 查不到的 symbol（ETF 等）fallback 成 symbol 本身，避免顯示 "nan"
598	    movers = stock_metrics.dropna(subset=["ret_1d"]).copy()
599	    movers["display_name"] = [
600	        (name_map.get(s) if isinstance(name_map.get(s), str) and name_map.get(s).strip() else s)
601	        for s in movers.index
602	    ]
603	    movers_up = movers.sort_values("ret_1d", ascending=False).head(20)
604	    movers_down = movers.sort_values("ret_1d", ascending=True).head(20)
605	
606	    category_aggs = compute_category_aggregates(stock_metrics, group_metrics)
607	
608	    index_html = env.get_template("index.html").render(
609	        **base_ctx,
610	        total_groups=total_groups,
611	        total_limit_up=total_limit_up,
612	        total_limit_down=total_limit_down,
613	        top_gain=top_gain,
614	        top_loss=top_loss,
615	        top_flow=top_flow,
616	        top_limit=top_limit,
617	        movers_up=movers_up,
618	        movers_down=movers_down,
619	        name_map=name_map,
620	        company_topics=company_topics,
621	        industry_map=data["industry_map"],
622	        category_aggs=category_aggs,
623	    )
624	    (DIST_DIR / "index.html").write_text(index_html, encoding="utf-8")
625	
626	    # Topics overview
627	    topics_html = env.get_template("topics.html").render(
628	        **base_ctx,
629	        groups=sorted(
630	            CONCEPT_GROUPS.keys(),
631	            key=lambda g: (
632	                get_meta(g)["category"],
633	                -group_metrics.get(g, {}).get("amount_sum_mn", 0),
634	            ),
635	        ),
636	        group_metrics=group_metrics,
637	        get_meta=get_meta,
638	        categories=sorted({get_meta(g)["category"] for g in CONCEPT_GROUPS}),
639	    )
640	    (DIST_DIR / "topics.html").write_text(topics_html, encoding="utf-8")
641	
642	    # Heatmap（內嵌 JSON 避 file:// CORS）
643	    heatmap_json = {
644	        tf: json.dumps(nodes, ensure_ascii=False)
645	        for tf, nodes in build_heatmap_data(stock_metrics, name_map).items()
646	    }
647	    heatmap_html = env.get_template("heatmap.html").render(
648	        **base_ctx,
649	        heatmap_daily=heatmap_json["daily"],
650	        heatmap_weekly=heatmap_json["weekly"],
651	        heatmap_monthly=heatmap_json["monthly"],
652	    )
653	    (DIST_DIR / "heatmap.html").write_text(heatmap_html, encoding="utf-8")
654	
655	    # AI 分析頁（族群輪動 + 落後補漲）
656	    # 落後補漲：20D 弱但 5D 轉強
657	    laggards = []
658	    for g, m in group_metrics.items():
659	        if m["ret_20d_mean"] < -0.03 and m["ret_5d_mean"] > 0.01:
660	            laggards.append((g, m))
661	    laggards.sort(key=lambda x: -x[1]["ret_5d_mean"])
662	    # 強勢延續：20D 強 + 5D 強 + 今日強
663	    leaders = []
664	    for g, m in group_metrics.items():
665	        if m["ret_20d_mean"] > 0.05 and m["ret_5d_mean"] > 0.02 and m["ret_1d_mean"] > 0:
666	            leaders.append((g, m))
667	    leaders.sort(key=lambda x: -(x[1]["ret_5d_mean"] + x[1]["ret_1d_mean"]))
668	    ai_html = env.get_template("ai_analysis.html").render(
669	        **base_ctx,
670	        laggards=laggards[:10],
671	        leaders=leaders[:10],
672	        get_meta=get_meta,
673	    )
674	    (DIST_DIR / "ai.html").write_text(ai_html, encoding="utf-8")
675	
676	    # 每個題材頁
677	    topic_dir = DIST_DIR / "topic"
678	    topic_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
679	    tpl_topic = env.get_template("topic_detail.html")
680	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
681	        meta = get_meta(group)
682	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)].copy()
683	        rows["display_name"] = [
684	            (name_map.get(s) if isinstance(name_map.get(s), str) and name_map.get(s).strip() else s)
685	            for s in rows.index
686	        ]
687	        rows_sorted = rows.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False)
688	        topic_series = compute_topic_return_series(data, members, days=125)
689	        html = tpl_topic.render(
690	            **base_ctx,
691	            group=group,
692	            meta=meta,
693	            stocks=rows_sorted,
694	            summary=group_metrics.get(group, {}),
695	            related=related.get(group, []),
696	            name_map=name_map,
697	            company_topics=company_topics,
698	            topic_series_json=json.dumps(topic_series, ensure_ascii=False) if topic_series else "null",
699	        )
700	        (topic_dir / f"{slugify(group)}.html").write_text(html, encoding="utf-8")
701	
702	    # 每檔個股頁
703	    company_dir = DIST_DIR / "company"
704	    company_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
705	    tpl_company = env.get_template("company.html")
706	    for sym, topics in company_topics.items():
707	        if sym not in stock_metrics.index:
708	            continue
709	        row = stock_metrics.loc[sym]
710	        market = data["market_map"].get(sym, "")
711	        market_disp = {"sii": "上市", "otc": "上櫃", "rotc": "興櫃"}.get(market, market)
712	        chart_data = compute_company_chart(data, sym, days=60)
713	        html = tpl_company.render(
714	            **base_ctx,
715	            symbol=sym,
716	            name=name_map.get(sym, sym),
717	            industry=data["industry_map"].get(sym, ""),
718	            market=market_disp,
719	            row=row,
720	            topics=[(t, get_meta(t)) for t in topics],
721	            chart_json=json.dumps(chart_data, ensure_ascii=False) if chart_data else "null",
722	        )
723	        (company_dir / f"{sym}.html").write_text(html, encoding="utf-8")
724	
725	
726	def copy_static():
727	    """複製靜態檔案"""
728	    dst = DIST_DIR / "static"
729	    if dst.exists():
730	        shutil.rmtree(dst)
731	    shutil.copytree(STATIC_SRC, dst)
732	
733	
734	def write_json_data(heatmap_data, search_data):
735	    data_dir = DIST_DIR / "data"
736	    data_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
737	    for tf, nodes in heatmap_data.items():
738	        (data_dir / f"heatmap_{tf}.json").write_text(
739	            json.dumps(nodes, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8",
740	        )
741	    # 搜尋資料輸出 .js 檔（script 載入避免 file:// CORS）
742	    (data_dir / "search-data.js").write_text(
743	        "window.SEARCH_DATA = " + json.dumps(search_data, ensure_ascii=False) + ";",
744	        encoding="utf-8",
745	    )
746	
747	
748	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
749	#   主流程
750	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
751	
752	def main():
753	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
754	    parser.add_argument("--skip-finlab", action="store_true", help="使用快取資料")
755	    parser.add_argument("--open", action="store_true", help="建置完畢自動開啟首頁")
756	    args = parser.parse_args()
757	
758	    print("═" * 60)
759	    print("  台股 AI 產業寶 - 網站建置")
760	    print("═" * 60)
761	
762	    DIST_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
763	
764	    print("\n[1/5] 載入資料...")
765	    data = load_data(use_cache=args.skip_finlab)

767	    print("[2/5] 計算個股指標...")
768	    stock_metrics = compute_stock_metrics(data)

772	    group_metrics = compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics)
773	    related = compute_related_topics()
774	    company_topics = compute_company_topics()

779	    search_data = build_search_data(stock_metrics, data["name_map"], company_topics)
780	    write_json_data(heatmap_data, search_data)

783	    copy_static()
784	    render_all(data, stock_metrics, group_metrics, related, company_topics)
785	
786	    idx = DIST_DIR / "index.html"
787	    print(f"\n✓ 建置完成！打開：{idx}")
788	    if args.open:

791	
792	if __name__ == "__main__":
```

```text
61	    .find(b => b.dataset.filter === filterValue) || document.querySelector('.filter-chip[data-filter="all"]');

66	  });

71	});
```

```text
66	  <div class="panel-header"><h2>判讀說明</h2></div>
67	  <ul class="notes">
68	    <li><b>強勢延續</b>：20日、5日、今日皆正，主力資金卡位中。進場偏逢回買，出場設 20日均線破線。</li>
69	    <li><b>落後補漲</b>：20日仍弱但 5日轉強，屬於資金輪動受益者。風險：仍可能是反彈而非反轉，搭配成交量與法人動向判斷。</li>
70	    <li><b>資料限制</b>：僅統計 CONCEPT_GROUPS 所覆蓋的族群，不包含未歸類個股。</li>
71	  </ul>
72	</section>
73	{% endblock %}
74
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-24 03:04:00Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```javascript
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
//   台股產業寶 - 搜尋 autocomplete + 互動
//   支援多個搜尋框（header global-search + 首頁 hero-search）
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════

(function() {
  const pairs = [
    ['global-search', 'search-dropdown'],
    ['hero-search',   'hero-search-dropdown'],
  ].map(([i, d]) => [document.getElementById(i), document.getElementById(d)])
   .filter(([i, d]) => i && d);
  if (!pairs.length) return;

  let SEARCH_DATA = [];

  function waitForData(cb, tries) {
    tries = tries || 0;
    if (window.SEARCH_DATA && Array.isArray(window.SEARCH_DATA)) {
      SEARCH_DATA = window.SEARCH_DATA;
      SEARCH_DATA.forEach(it => { it._k = (it.keywords || it.label).toLowerCase(); });
      cb();
    } else if (tries < 50) {
      setTimeout(() => waitForData(cb, tries + 1), 80);
    } else {
      console.warn('SEARCH_DATA 載入逾時');
    }
  }

  function setupSearch(input, dropdown) {
    let activeIdx = -1;
    let currentResults = [];

    function filter(q) {
      if (!q) return [];
      q = q.toLowerCase().trim();
      const tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      return SEARCH_DATA.filter(it =>
        tokens.every(t => it._k.includes(t))
      ).slice(0, 20);
    }

    function render(results) {
      currentResults = results;
      activeIdx = -1;
      if (!results.length) {
        dropdown.innerHTML = '<div class="search-item muted first">找不到相符結果</div>';
        dropdown.hidden = false;
        return;
      }
      const topics = results.filter(r => r.type === 'topic');
      const companies = results.filter(r => r.type === 'company');
      const parts = [];
      if (topics.length) {
        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">題材 / 族群</div>');
        topics.forEach((t) => {
          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${t.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(t)}">
            <strong>${t.label}</strong><small>${t.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
        });
      }
      if (companies.length) {
        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">公司 / 個股</div>');
        companies.forEach((c) => {
          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${c.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(c)}">
            <strong>${c.label}</strong><small>${c.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
        });
      }
      dropdown.innerHTML = parts.join('');
      dropdown.hidden = false;

      dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(el => {
        el.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          if (el.dataset.href) window.location.href = el.dataset.href;
        });
        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
          dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
          el.classList.add('active');
          activeIdx = parseInt(el.dataset.idx || -1, 10);
        });
      });
    }

    let debounce;
    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
      clearTimeout(debounce);
      debounce = setTimeout(() => {
        render(filter(input.value));
      }, 80);
    });

    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
      if (input.value) render(filter(input.value));
    });

    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (!e.target.closest('.search-box') && !e.target.closest('.hero-search-box')) {
        dropdown.hidden = true;
      }
    });

    input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (!currentResults.length) return;
      const items = Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item[data-href]'));
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
        e.preventDefault();
        activeIdx = Math.min(activeIdx + 1, items.length - 1);
        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
        e.preventDefault();
        activeIdx = Math.max(activeIdx - 1, 0);
        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
      } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (items[activeIdx]) window.location.href = items[activeIdx].dataset.href;
        else if (items[0]) window.location.href = items[0].dataset.href;
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        dropdown.hidden = true;
        input.blur();
      }
    });
  }

  waitForData(() => {
    pairs.forEach(([i, d]) => setupSearch(i, d));
  });

  // 快捷鍵 '/' 聚焦到第一個可用搜尋框（優先 hero）
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === '/' && e.target.tagName !== 'INPUT' && e.target.tagName !== 'TEXTAREA') {
      e.preventDefault();
      const first = document.getElementById('hero-search') || document.getElementById('global-search');
      if (first) first.focus();
    }
  });
})();

```

本次改動總結：

**字體放大（整站）**

- 區塊標題 22→24px、面板標題 17→18.5px
- 標籤/徽章 11→12px、資金 bar 標籤 13→14px
- 分類卡名稱 18→20px、描述 12→13.5px

**首頁改為搜尋導覽視窗**
- [index.html](site/templates/index.html)：`landing-hero` 換成 `hero-search`（42px 標題、autofocus 大搜尋框、熱門題材快速入口、KPI meta）
- [style.css](site/static/style.css)：新增 `.hero-search` 系列樣式，含 radial-gradient 背景、2px 邊框輸入框、hover 上浮的 quick-chip
- 族群地圖（`.category-map`）緊接在搜尋區下方

**雙搜尋框支援**
- [app.js](site/static/app.js)：重構為迴圈綁定 header global-search 與首頁 hero-search，共用 autocomplete 邏輯；`/` 快捷鍵優先聚焦 hero

已 rebuild 到 `site/dist/`，重整頁面即可看到新版。

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}
{% set page = "today" %}
{% block title %}今日焦點 · 台股產業寶{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<section class="hero">
  <h1>今日焦點 <small>{{ last_date }}</small></h1>
  <p>當日強弱族群、資金集中度、漲停家數與個股漲跌幅榜。點擊題材或個股可深入查看詳情。</p>
</section>

<section class="section-block">
  <header class="section-head">
    <h2 class="section-title">族群強弱</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">按成分股平均漲跌幅排序</p>
  </header>

  <div class="grid-2col">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <h2>今日強勢題材</h2>
        <span class="muted">按成分股平均漲幅</span>
      </div>
      <table class="table compact">
        <thead><tr><th>題材</th><th>今日</th><th>5日</th><th>20日</th><th>資金</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for g, m in top_gain[:10] %}
          {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
          <tr>
            <td><a href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html" class="topic-chip" style="border-color:{{ meta.color }}; color:{{ meta.color }};">{{ g }}</a></td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_1d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_1d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_5d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_5d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_20d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_20d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td>{{ m.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <h2>今日弱勢題材</h2>
        <span class="muted">按成分股平均跌幅</span>
      </div>
      <table class="table compact">
        <thead><tr><th>題材</th><th>今日</th><th>5日</th><th>20日</th><th>資金</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for g, m in top_loss[:10] %}
          {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
          <tr>
            <td><a href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html" class="topic-chip" style="border-color:{{ meta.color }}; color:{{ meta.color }};">{{ g }}</a></td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_1d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_1d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_5d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_5d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_20d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_20d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td>{{ m.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="grid-2col">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header"><h2>資金集中排行</h2><span class="muted">當日題材成交額</span></div>
      <div class="bar-list">
        {% set max_amt = top_flow[0][1].amount_sum_mn if top_flow else 1 %}
        {% for g, m in top_flow[:12] %}
        {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
        <a class="bar-row" href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html">
          <span class="bar-label">{{ g }}</span>
          <span class="bar-track">
            <span class="bar-fill" style="width:{{ (m.amount_sum_mn/max_amt*100)|round(1) }}%; background:{{ meta.color }};"></span>
          </span>
          <span class="bar-value">{{ m.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</span>
        </a>
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header"><h2>漲停家數最多</h2><span class="muted">族群輪動領頭</span></div>
      <div class="bar-list">
        {% set max_lu = top_limit[0][1].n_limit_up if top_limit and top_limit[0][1].n_limit_up > 0 else 1 %}
        {% for g, m in top_limit[:12] %}
        {% if m.n_limit_up > 0 %}
        {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
        <a class="bar-row" href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html">
          <span class="bar-label">{{ g }}</span>
          <span class="bar-track">
            <span class="bar-fill" style="width:{{ (m.n_limit_up/max_lu*100)|round(1) }}%; background:#dc2626;"></span>
          </span>
          <span class="bar-value">{{ m.n_limit_up }} 檔</span>
        </a>
        {% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-block">
  <header class="section-head">
    <h2 class="section-title">個股動向</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">今日漲幅前 20 與跌幅前 20，點擊可查看個股詳情</p>
  </header>

  <div class="grid-2col">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header"><h2>個股漲幅榜</h2></div>
      <table class="table compact">
        <thead><tr><th>股票</th><th>漲幅</th><th>5日</th><th>收盤</th><th>所屬題材</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for sym, row in movers_up.iterrows() %}
          <tr>
            <td><a href="company/{{ sym }}.html">{{ row.display_name }} <span class="muted">({{ sym }})</span></a></td>
            <td class="positive">{{ row.ret_1d|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if row.ret_5d > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ row.ret_5d|pct }}</td>
            <td>{{ "%.2f"|format(row.close) }}</td>
            <td>
              {% set tp = company_topics.get(sym, []) %}
              {% if tp %}
                {% for t in tp[:2] %}<span class="tag">{{ t }}</span>{% endfor %}
                {% if tp|length > 2 %}
                  <span class="tag tag-more" data-tip="{{ tp[2:]|join('、') }}" title="{{ tp[2:]|join('、') }}">+{{ tp|length-2 }}</span>
                {% endif %}
              {% else %}
                {% set ind = industry_map.get(sym) %}
                {% if ind %}<span class="tag tag-industry">{{ ind }}</span>{% else %}<span class="muted">—</span>{% endif %}
              {% endif %}
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header"><h2>個股跌幅榜</h2></div>
      <table class="table compact">
        <thead><tr><th>股票</th><th>跌幅</th><th>5日</th><th>收盤</th><th>所屬題材</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for sym, row in movers_down.iterrows() %}
          <tr>
            <td><a href="company/{{ sym }}.html">{{ row.display_name }} <span class="muted">({{ sym }})</span></a></td>
            <td class="negative">{{ row.ret_1d|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if row.ret_5d > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ row.ret_5d|pct }}</td>
            <td>{{ "%.2f"|format(row.close) }}</td>
            <td>
              {% set tp = company_topics.get(sym, []) %}
              {% if tp %}
                {% for t in tp[:2] %}<span class="tag">{{ t }}</span>{% endfor %}
                {% if tp|length > 2 %}
                  <span class="tag tag-more" data-tip="{{ tp[2:]|join('、') }}" title="{{ tp[2:]|join('、') }}">+{{ tp|length-2 }}</span>
                {% endif %}
              {% else %}
                {% set ind = industry_map.get(sym) %}
                {% if ind %}<span class="tag tag-industry">{{ ind }}</span>{% else %}<span class="muted">—</span>{% endif %}
              {% endif %}
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
{% endblock %}

```

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}
{% set page = "index" %}
{% block title %}台股產業寶 · 搜尋個股與題材{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<section class="hero-search">
  <div class="hero-search-inner">
    <p class="eyebrow">Taiwan Industry Intelligence · {{ last_date }}</p>
    <h1 class="hero-search-title">搜尋個股或題材<br>一鍵進入族群全貌</h1>
    <p class="hero-search-sub">
      輸入股票代號、公司名稱或題材關鍵字，即時定位所屬族群、法人動向與相關個股。
      涵蓋 {{ total_stocks }} 檔上市櫃全股票、{{ total_groups }} 個題材族群。
    </p>

    <div class="hero-search-box">
      <svg class="search-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="text" id="hero-search" placeholder="例如：2330、台積電、CoWoS、AI 伺服器" autocomplete="off" autofocus>
      <div class="search-dropdown" id="hero-search-dropdown" hidden></div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-search-quick">
      <span class="quick-label">熱門題材：</span>
      {% for g, m in top_flow[:6] %}
      <a href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html" class="quick-chip">{{ g }}</a>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>

    <div class="hero-search-meta">
      <div><strong>{{ total_stocks }}</strong><em>上市櫃個股</em></div>
      <div><strong>{{ total_groups }}</strong><em>題材族群</em></div>
      <div><strong class="positive">{{ total_limit_up }}</strong><em>今日漲停</em></div>
      <div><strong class="negative">{{ total_limit_down }}</strong><em>今日跌停</em></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-block">
  <header class="section-head">
    <h2 class="section-title">族群地圖</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">點擊任一分類，深入查看該領域的題材族群與成分股</p>
  </header>

  <div class="category-map">
    {% for cat in category_aggs %}
    <a href="topics.html?cat={{ cat.name|urlencode }}" class="category-card"
       data-category="{{ cat.name }}">
      <span class="category-rule" style="background:{{ cat.color }};"></span>
      <div class="category-card-body">
        <div class="category-card-head">
          <h3 class="category-name">{{ cat.name }}</h3>
          <span class="category-count">{{ cat.n_groups }} 題材 · {{ cat.n_stocks }} 股</span>
        </div>
        <ul class="category-topics">
          {% for g in cat.top_groups %}<li>{{ g }}</li>{% endfor %}
        </ul>
        <div class="category-stats">
          <span class="{% if cat.ret_mean > 0 %}positive{% elif cat.ret_mean < 0 %}negative{% endif %}">
            {{ cat.ret_mean|pct }}
          </span>
          <span class="amt">{{ cat.total_amt|fmt_amount }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>
    {% endfor %}
  </div>
</section>
{% endblock %}

```

```bash
cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/fin ai/族群統計網頁/site" && python -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '..')
from build_site import load_data
from industry_meta import INDUSTRY_META
from concept_groups import CONCEPT_GROUPS
d = load_data(use_cache=True)
ind_map = d['industry_map']
name_map = d['name_map']

covered = set()
for g, ms in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
    covered.update(ms)

# 列出各產業類別下未覆蓋的股票樣本
from collections import defaultdict
uncovered_by_ind = defaultdict(list)
for sym in name_map:
    if sym not in covered:
        ind = ind_map.get(sym, '未分類')
        uncovered_by_ind[ind].append((sym, name_map.get(sym, sym)))

# 印出主要產業的未覆蓋股票
priority = ['生技醫療業', '電子零組件業', '半導體業', '光電業', '電腦及週邊設備業', '電機機械', '其他電子業', '建材營造', '通信網路業', '綠能環保', '化學工業', '汽車工業', '鋼鐵工業', '紡織纖維', '食品工業', '觀光餐旅', '資訊服務業', '數位雲端', '金融保險業', '運動休閒', '航運業', '文化創意業', '居家生活', '電子通路業']
for ind in priority:
    stocks = uncovered_by_ind.get(ind, [])
    if not stocks: continue
    print(f'\\n=== {ind} ({len(stocks)} 檔未覆蓋) ===')
    for s, n in stocks[:30]:
        print(f'  {s} {n}')
" > /tmp/uncovered_audit.txt 2>&1
echo "報告長度:" && wc -l /tmp/uncovered_audit.txt
head -60 /tmp/uncovered_audit.txt
```

```bash
import re
with open('/tmp/aisk_6584.html', encoding='utf-8') as f:

# 抓 <title>

text = re.sub(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', text)

print('---')
print('TEXT LEN:', len(text))
print(text[:8000])
"
```

```bash
print('---')
# 找 fetch()

for f in fs[:20]:

"
```

```bash
import re

pushes = re.findall(r'self\.__next_f\.push\(\[1,\"((?:\\\\.|[^\"])*)\"\]\)', html)
print(f'Found {len(pushes)} next_f pushes, total bytes:', sum(len(p) for p in pushes))
# 找最大的
pushes.sort(key=len, reverse=True)
for i, p in enumerate(pushes[:3]):
    print(f'--- push {i} len {len(p)} ---')
    # unescape
    u = p.replace('\\\\n', '\n').replace('\\\\\"', '\"').replace('\\\\u003c', '<')
    print(u[:2000])
"
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-24 08:44:21Z)**_

> 頂層設計對齊一下：aistockmap 的資料源本身就是公開資料彙整，直接爬第三方站有三個風險點。

**技術現況**
- aistockmap 是 Next.js client-render，內容靠 JS 拉 API（伺服器只回外殼）
- 直接 curl 只拿到 `載入公司資料中...`，API 路徑回 404（內部網關）
- 要爬要用 Chrome 自動化，2316 頁 × rate limit ≈ 3-6 小時，且違反 ToS

**建議方案：用 FinLab 資料拉出更完整的個股頁**
FinLab 已有的欄位（我剛實測 2330）：
- **公司基本**：44 欄（簡稱、統編、董監、發言人、電話、地址、網址、成立/上市日、股本、會計師...）
- **主要業務**：`company_main_business`
- **月營收**：`monthly_revenue:當月營收` / `去年當月` / 年增率
- **財報**：`financial_statement:*`（營收、毛利、營業利益、淨利、EPS、ROE...）
- **股利**：`dividend_tse/otc:現金股利`
- **董監持股**：`internal_equity_pledge:董監持股`
- **法人籌碼**：`institutional_investors_trading_summary:*`

**為什麼 FinLab 勝出**
1. 合法授權、速度快（不用 rate limit）
2. 欄位比 aistockmap 更完整（財報/籌碼/董監都有）
3. 每日自動更新，不會中斷

要不要我直接用 FinLab 做？我可以：
- 擴充 [company.html](site/templates/company.html) 加 5-6 個新 section：主要業務、月營收走勢、財務指標、股利政策、董監持股、法人近期動向
- 新增「公司資料庫」導覽頁（全上市櫃列表 + 搜尋/篩選）

等你點頭就開動，估 30-40 分鐘完成。

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""
抓取 FinLab 所有公司豐富資料，輸出 .company_rich.pkl
包含：公司基本、主要業務、月營收 24 個月、財報 8 季、股利 8 筆、董監持股

用法：
  python site/fetch_company_rich.py
"""
from __future__ import annotations
import sys
import pickle
import warnings
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(ROOT.parent))

import pandas as pd
from finlab import data

OUT = ROOT / ".company_rich.pkl"


def _safe_float(v):
    try:
        if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)):
            return None
        return float(v)
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        return None


def _safe_str(v):
    if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)):
        return ""
    return str(v).strip()


def _roc_to_ad(period: str) -> str:
    """'114年' -> '2025年'；'114年上半年' -> '2025上半年'"""
    s = _safe_str(period)
    if not s:
        return ""
    import re
    m = re.match(r"(\d+)年", s)
    if not m:
        return s
    yr = int(m.group(1)) + 1911
    rest = s[m.end():]
    return f"{yr}{rest}" if rest else f"{yr}"


def main():
    out = {
        "basic": {},       # sym -> dict
        "business": {},    # sym -> str (主要業務)
        "revenue": {},     # sym -> list[{ym, rev, yoy_pct}]  近 24 個月
        "financials": {},  # sym -> list[{q, eps, gm, opm, npm, roe, revenue_mn}] 近 8 季
        "dividends": {},   # sym -> list[{period, cash, stock, ex_date}]  近 8 筆
        "director": {},    # sym -> float  董監持股 %
        "generated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
    }

    print("[1/6] 公司基本資料...")
    info = data.get("company_basic_info")
    for _, r in info.iterrows():
        sym = _safe_str(r["symbol"])
        if not sym:
            continue
        out["basic"][sym] = {
            "公司簡稱":    _safe_str(r.get("公司簡稱", "")),
            "公司名稱":    _safe_str(r.get("公司名稱", "")),
            "英文簡稱":    _safe_str(r.get("英文簡稱", "")),
            "產業類別":    _safe_str(r.get("產業類別", "")),
            "市場別":      _safe_str(r.get("市場別", "")),
            "成立日期":    _safe_str(r.get("成立日期", "")).split(" ")[0],
            "上市日期":    _safe_str(r.get("上市日期", "")).split(" ")[0],
            "上櫃日期":    _safe_str(r.get("上櫃日期", "")).split(" ")[0],
            "董事長":      _safe_str(r.get("董事長", "")),
            "總經理":      _safe_str(r.get("總經理", "")).replace("總裁: ", ""),
            "發言人":      _safe_str(r.get("發言人", "")),
            "發言人職稱":  _safe_str(r.get("發言人職稱", "")),
            "住址":        _safe_str(r.get("住址", "")),
            "總機電話":    _safe_str(r.get("總機電話", "")),
            "公司網址":    _safe_str(r.get("公司網址", "")),
            "統編":        _safe_str(r.get("營利事業統一編號", "")),
            "實收資本額":  _safe_float(r.get("實收資本額(元)", 0)),
            "已發行股數":  _safe_float(r.get("已發行普通股數或TDR原發行股數", 0)),
        }
    print(f"       ✓ {len(out['basic'])} 檔")

    print("[2/6] 主要業務...")
    biz = data.get("company_main_business")
    for _, r in biz.iterrows():
        sym = _safe_str(r.get("symbol", ""))
        desc = _safe_str(r.get("主要經營業務", ""))
        if sym and desc:
            out["business"][sym] = desc
    print(f"       ✓ {len(out['business'])} 檔")

    print("[3/6] 月營收 24 個月 + YoY...")
    rev = data.get("monthly_revenue:當月營收")
    rev_yoy = data.get("monthly_revenue:去年當月營收")
    for sym in rev.columns:
        s = rev[sym].tail(24)
        if s.dropna().empty:
            continue
        items = []
        for d, v in s.items():
            if pd.isna(v):
                continue
            v_now = float(v)
            yoy = None
            if sym in rev_yoy.columns:
                ly = rev_yoy.at[d, sym]
                if pd.notna(ly) and float(ly) > 0:
                    yoy = (v_now - float(ly)) / float(ly) * 100
            items.append({
                "ym":  d.strftime("%Y-%m") if hasattr(d, "strftime") else str(d),
                "rev": round(v_now / 1000, 0),  # 千元 → 單位：千元
                "yoy": round(yoy, 2) if yoy is not None else None,
            })
        if items:
            out["revenue"][sym] = items
    print(f"       ✓ {len(out['revenue'])} 檔")

    print("[4/6] 財報指標（EPS / 毛利率 / 營益率 / 淨利率 / ROE）近 8 季...")
    eps = data.get("financial_statement:每股盈餘")
    gm = data.get("fundamental_features:營業毛利率")
    opm = data.get("fundamental_features:營業利益率")
    npm = data.get("fundamental_features:稅後淨利率")
    roe = data.get("fundamental_features:ROE稅後")
    rev_q = data.get("financial_statement:營業收入淨額")
    quarters = eps.index[-8:]
    all_syms = set(eps.columns) | set(gm.columns)
    for sym in all_syms:
        rows = []
        for q in quarters:
            def g(df):
                if sym in df.columns and q in df.index:
                    v = df.at[q, sym]
                    return float(v) if pd.notna(v) else None
                return None
            revm = g(rev_q)
            rows.append({
                "q":       str(q),
                "eps":     g(eps),
                "gm":      g(gm),
                "opm":     g(opm),
                "npm":     g(npm),
                "roe":     g(roe),
                "rev_mn":  round(revm / 1000, 0) if revm else None,  # 千元 → 百萬
            })
        # 至少要有一季有資料才保留
        if any(r["eps"] is not None or r["rev_mn"] is not None for r in rows):
            out["financials"][sym] = rows
    print(f"       ✓ {len(out['financials'])} 檔")

    print("[5/6] 股利公告近 8 筆...")
    da = data.get("dividend_announcement")
    da_sorted = da.sort_values("除息交易日")
    for sym, g in da_sorted.groupby("symbol"):
        sym = _safe_str(sym)
        if not sym:
            continue
        tail = g.tail(8)
        rows = []
        for _, r in tail.iterrows():
            cash = _safe_float(r.get("盈餘分配之股東現金股利(元/股)", 0)) or 0
            stock = _safe_float(r.get("盈餘轉增資配股(元/股)", 0)) or 0
            if cash == 0 and stock == 0:
                continue
            ex = _safe_str(r.get("除息交易日", "")).split(" ")[0]
            rows.append({
                "period": _roc_to_ad(r.get("股利所屬期間", "")),
                "cash":   round(cash, 3),
                "stock":  round(stock, 3),
                "ex_date": ex if ex != "NaT" else "",
            })
        if rows:
            out["dividends"][sym] = rows
    print(f"       ✓ {len(out['dividends'])} 檔")

    print("[6/6] 董監持股比例...")
    dh = data.get("internal_equity_pledge:董監持股")
    latest = dh.iloc[-1]
    for sym, v in latest.items():
        sym = _safe_str(sym)
        if sym and pd.notna(v):
            out["director"][sym] = round(float(v), 2)
    print(f"       ✓ {len(out['director'])} 檔")

    with open(OUT, "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(out, f)
    size_mb = OUT.stat().st_size / 1024 / 1024
    print(f"\n✓ 已輸出 {OUT.name}（{size_mb:.1f} MB）")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

```
